As members earn XP, they level up and you can set up level up messages, special roles, and other rewards to fit your community.\n\nLearn more here: https://docs.dyno.gg/en/modules/levels\n\n🛠️ Improvements and Fixes\nOur team has been focused on stability and monitoring across our infrastructure. The bot has been running smoothly lately, and we are continuing to make steady improvements. This has also given us more time to work on new modules and features, with more on the way.\n\n🛍️ Black Friday Sale\nIt looks like some folks missed the Black Friday sale. No worries, we will have more sales in the future. Make sure you are subscribed to the <#535188463402745865> channel for announcements.\n\n- The Dyno Team
